## Why BuyAndScrap is Your Go-To for Cheap Cars in Aberdeen

### MOT Matters: Your Peace of Mind

When you're looking for **cheap cars Aberdeen**, one of the most important things to check is whether the vehicle has a valid MOT certificate. An MOT (Ministry of Transport) test is an annual inspection of a vehicle's roadworthiness, safety, and exhaust emissions. While it's not a guarantee of a perfect car, a current MOT tells you that at the time of the test, the car met the minimum legal standards to be on the road. Many of the cars listed on BuyAndScrap will come with a valid MOT, giving you one less thing to worry about right after purchase.

## What to Consider When Buying a Cheap Car

Even when buying an affordable car, it's wise to do your homework. Here are a few tips to ensure you make a smart purchase.

### Set Your Budget (And Stick To It!)

Before you start browsing, decide on your absolute maximum budget. Remember to factor in not just the purchase price, but also potential costs like insurance, road tax, and any immediate maintenance or repairs that might be needed. Being clear on your budget will help you narrow down your search for **cheap cars Aberdeen** effectively.

### Inspection is Key

When you find a car that catches your eye, arrange to view it in person. Give it a thorough visual check: look at the tyres (tread depth, general condition), check for any obvious damage or rust, and take a peek under the bonnet. Don't be afraid to ask the seller questions about the car's history, any known issues, and why they're selling. If possible, take it for a test drive to feel how it handles.

### Service History & V5 Logbook

Always ask for the car's service history and, crucially, the V5C logbook. The service history gives you an insight into how well the car has been maintained over the years, while the V5C proves legal ownership. It's vital to ensure the details on the V5C match the car and the seller's identification.
